scope_completed: This cleanup only updates packet metadata. It does not change retrieval runtime behavior, and it does not add or modify `src/qual/engine/retrieval/pageindex_strategy.py` or `src/qual/engine/retrieval/embeddings_strategy.py`; `pageindex` and `embeddings` remain deferred in `FTS_FIRST_POLICY.deferred_strategy_ids`, so they are not required runtime paths. The packet now separates the implementation history from the docs-only cleanup and keeps the `section:` compatibility note explicit.
scope_goal: Apply the reviewer-required packet fixes for the retrieval FTS handoff metadata by clearly labeling the docs-only cleanup commit and keeping the reviewed file list aligned with the cleanup diff.
tasks_completed: Labeled the reviewed commit as docs-only cleanup instead of implying a retrieval code change.
Replaced the feature-code file list with the actual handoff artifact diff so the reviewed files match the commit.
Added a standalone scope-completed summary that separates the retrieval implementation history from the metadata cleanup.
compatibility_note: section scope rejection is a compatibility guard until PageIndex can resolve concrete section targets; src/qual/engine/retrieval/pageindex_strategy.py and src/qual/engine/retrieval/embeddings_strategy.py are not present in this worktree, so no cleanup changes were made there; pageindex and embeddings remain deferred-only in the FTS-first policy snapshot.
